game_log: Fizzwick: You there! Adventurers! I am Fizzwick, and I've made a terrible mistake.
Fizzwick: My machine was meant to bring endless daylight to Duskhollow...
Fizzwick: Instead it's consumed the sun entirely! The town is trapped in darkness!
Fizzwick: Only the 8 Keys of Shadow can reverse it. They're hidden in dungeons across the land — each one guarded by fiercer monsters than the last.
Fizzwick: Will you help me recover them and save Duskhollow?
Fizzwick: Thank you! The 8 dungeons are scattered across the land. Start with the closest one — it's the easiest. Bring the keys back to me!
You descend into Ratling Warren - Floor 1... Torch lit!
Merry picked the lock! (4 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 18 gold and Dagger.
Found the Iron Key! A portal appears!
The portal returns you to the surface!
Fizzwick: Wonderful! You found the Iron Key! That's 1/8 keys. Keep going!
